query: The open source Ahrefs alternative complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: RustySEO Review: Free Open-Source Alternative to Ahrefs - WordsAtScale
results.content:
Pros:

+ Completely free with no subscription costs or hidden fees
+ Comprehensive technical auditing capabilities rivaling paid tools
+ Modern AI integration for intelligent analysis and recommendations
+ Cross-platform desktop application with offline functionality
+ Active development with regular updates and improvements
+ Multiple export formats for flexible reporting

Cons:

+ Early-stage software with acknowledged bugs and stability issues
+ Requires technical knowledge for API setup and authentication
+ Limited JavaScript rendering capabilities affect dynamic sites
+ No backlink analysis or competitive intelligence features
+ Smaller community means fewer tutorials and support resources

## Who Should Use RustySEO? [...] RustySEO targets SEO professionals, marketers, developers, and website owners who need detailed performance insights without the hefty subscription fees. The project is actively developed with regular updates, and the latest version 0.2.3 demonstrates the creator’s commitment to continuous improvement. The tool integrates with popular APIs including Google Search Console and Google Page Speed Insights, providing access to official Google data at no cost. [...] All integrated services including Google Search Console data, Page Speed Insights analysis, and AI-powered recommendations are provided at no cost. The only limitations involve usage quotas designed to prevent abuse—users making multiple requests per second may encounter 404 or 503 responses from API providers.

This pricing approach creates compelling value for several user segments. Small businesses typically spending $100-300 monthly on SEO tools can achieve similar technical auditing capabilities at zero cost. Individual website owners and developers gain access to professional-grade analysis without budget constraints.

results.title: I've Tested 6 Ahrefs Alternatives: Here's What Works
results.content:
Ahrefs has always been a go-to SEO platform for professionals. Unlike Semrush, which positions itself as an all-in-one marketing suite, Ahrefs stays laser-focused on SEO. But lately, I’ve been testing a few new Ahrefs alternatives that deserve attention — tools like Search Atlas and Writesonic, which offer impressive functionality at a lower cost.

texture

texture

Find easy-to-rank topics that drive traffic

Stop guessing what to write about — get data-backed topic ideas based on real search behavior and intent.

I eventually stopped using Ahrefs Lite after the platform switched to a credit-based system. The credits disappeared fast, and I found myself paying extra just to finish projects. The unpredictable pricing made it hard to plan expenses, which was frustrating.

results.title: Ahrefs Cons & Better Alternatives (2026): Reddit Reviews + FAQs - Search Atlas - Advanced SEO Software
results.content:
### What Do Reddit Users Think About Ahrefs?

Reddit users share mixed opinions about Ahrefs, leaning toward frustration in recent years. Reddit users acknowledge that Ahrefs has long been regarded as a leader in backlink analysis and SEO research. Frequent changes in pricing, credit systems, and access limitations now dominate most threads. Reddit users often describe the shift as a move away from user-focused value toward aggressive monetization.

Common complaints revolve around the tool’s pricing model. Reddit users feel that basic features that were once accessible now often require higher-tier plans or costly add-ons. [...] #### How Reliable and Legit is Ahrefs as an SEO Tool?

Ahrefs is generally considered a reliable and legitimate SEO tool.

Reddit discussions reveal a growing sense of dissatisfaction among users. The most common complaints revolve around the credit-based pricing system in Ahrefs. Several users have expressed frustration at being charged for nearly every action inside the tool, describing the experience as confusing or unfair.

This model leads Reddit users to call it a scam, not because of fraudulent behavior, but because they feel the pricing lacks transparency and does not deliver enough value for the cost.

### What is the Best Alternative to Ahrefs Tool? [...] Ahrefs users report getting helpful replies within 24 hours, while others criticize the support team for offering canned responses that don’t resolve the issue. Ahrefs users note delays during high-demand periods and express frustration over the lack of urgency in handling billing or account-related concerns.

A recurring complaint about Ahrefs’ customer support involves limited flexibility. For instance, Ahrefs users trying to revert to old plans or dispute charges often find customer support unwilling to make exceptions, even in clear-cut cases.

Users feel that the Ahrefs support team carries a dismissive attitude and focuses on explaining their policies rather than finding solutions for frustrated customers.

#### How Reliable and Legit is Ahrefs as an SEO Tool?

results.title: Ahrefs is rated "Poor" with 2.1 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
Sep 7, 2025

Image 50: Rated 1 out of 5 stars

## They just kicked me out of…
They just kicked me out of grandfathered plan by removing the feature I needed most (batch analysis), effectively raising the price a lot, and now they have a new ranking factor related to AI showing how often you show up in ChatGPT and other LLM's and that would raise the price again 5x. Most of the new features I don't need in the new more expensive plan, and then of course the main useful thing is locked behind a big service price increase. This company has gotten greedy and is hoping you are too lazy to do your research on alternatives. I've canceled my sub and won't be back, the trust is broken.

## Shady Company & Terrible UX
I've worked with several SEO tools, and this is by far the worst. The UX is like something from 20 years ago. It's incredibly confusing, and the fact that they use non-standard language for core services doesn't help. The documentation and their AI bot are worthless. I had the AI bot try to tell me I needed to upgrade my credits to use a tool I was having trouble with, in spite of having 350 credits in my account. This company is VERY shady. SEMRush a superior alternative.

Users praise the international coverage and bulk analysis features. Common complaints focus on interface usability and inconsistent customer support. The consensus: best value for international SEO work, especially if you’re managing campaigns in multiple countries.

### 7. SpyFu – Best for Competitor PPC Research

Best For: PPC specialists and SEO professionals who need historical competitor data for both paid and organic search.

How I Use It: I use SpyFu when analyzing competitors’ paid search strategies. Seeing years of historical ad copy, budgets, and keyword testing gives insights you can’t get anywhere else.
